Zheng Gan й„ӯз”ҳ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Gan (й„ӯз”ҳ). Mountain bandit who surrendered to Wei. Rebelled again and was killed by Cao Ren. Zheng Gan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zheng Gan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
